settings.content: Watch Our Sleep Trial Video Explainer
Rest assured with our 200-night sleep trial in your home, in partnership with The British Heart Foundation. Free returns on all mattress orders (1 mattress trial per order & address)

settings.heading: Risk Free
settings.content: We provide a risk-free sleep trial on all our mattresses. This allows you to sleep on a REM-Fit for up to 200-nights in the comfort of your own home and really put it to the test!

settings.heading: What's the catch?
settings.content: There are no catches. if the mattress, for whatever reason doesn't live up to your expectations, you can send it back for a full refund. There are no collection charges either!

settings.heading: Bedding-In
settings.content: We request that you give your new REM-Fit mattress 30 nights to bed-in before you raise a return. This will give your body the right amount of time to fully adjust to the new sleeping surface.

settings.heading: How?
settings.content: How do I raise a return request? Simply use our chat bot on this page and you will be able to raise a return or exchange request.
We never waste a returned mattress

We donate our mattresses to the British Heart Foundation. All returned mattresses are sold on through their network of UK based store.

100% of proceeds go towards The British Heart Foundation charity.

settings.question: How does the up to 200-night trial work?
settings.answer: We provide a risk-free sleep trial on all our mattresses. This allows you to sleep on a REM-Fit for up to 200-nights in the comfort of your own home and really put it to the test! There are no catches. If the mattress, for whatever reason doesn’t live up to your expectations, you can send it back for a full refund. There are no collection charges either! If the mattress isn't 100% right for you, simply begin the return or exchange process via our live chat, and we'll arrange the rest for you. The sleep trial is only available for 1 mattress per order & address. Subsequent mattresses ordered on the same order or delivered to the same address will not be eligible for the sleep trial. Full T&C's available here

settings.question: When does the trial start?
settings.answer: Your trial starts the day your mattress is delivered and received by you.

settings.question: Do I need a mattress protector?
settings.answer:
It's not something we stipulate, but we do require you to keep the mattress in a good condition.

To extend the trial period from 100-nights to 200-nights, you do need to purchase a REM-Fit mattress protector at the time of your order.

settings.question: Why does the mattress need to be in good condition if returning it?
settings.answer: As part of our social and environmental awareness, returned mattresses are either donated to charity and sold on through our partners at the British Heart Foundation or sold on as ‘rejuvenated’ mattresses via various channels and therefore must be clean. Rejuvenated mattresses are steam cleaned, maintained and if required fitted with a brand-new REM-Fit mattress cover. Rejuvenated mattresses are never sold on as ‘new’ on our website.

settings.question: Will I need the box and plastic packaging if returning the mattress?
settings.answer: No, we want you to get the full experience when trialling the mattress so please discard of all packaging once delivery is received.

settings.question: Do I still qualify for the sleep trial if I decide to finance my order with you?
settings.answer: Yes, of course. If you decide to return the mattress we will refund all instalments you have paid to date and cancel the agreement for you.

settings.question: Can I really trial a mattress for up to 200-nights?
settings.answer: Yes, and there are no catches either. If the mattress, for whatever reason doesn’t live up to your expectations, you can send it back for a full refund or exchange it to a different model. There are no collection charges either!

settings.question: Do I need to use a mattress protector?
settings.answer: It's not something we stipulate but we do require you to keep the mattress in a good condition so that we can donate to The British Heart Foundation - so it's a good idea to use a mattress protector

settings.question: Can I exchange my REM-Fit mattress for a different REM-Fit mattress?
settings.answer: Yes, you can exchange your first mattress for a different model. Please begin the process with our clever chat bot.

settings.question: How do I return my mattress under the 100-night trial?
settings.answer: We've made the process easy with our clever 100-night trial chat bot. Please have your order number handy and then begin the process via our live chat - if you should need any assistance please email us at sales@rem-fit.co.uk.

settings.question: My order contained free gifts, what happens to these if I return my mattress?
settings.answer:
In order to receive a full refund when returning your mattress under the mattress sleep trial scheme, please follow the below instructions.

- Free gifts must be unused.
- Free gifts must be in their original packaging.
- Free gifts must be returned - REM-Fit will provide a free collection.

If you have used your free gifts, please contact us and we will provide you with a selection of options to consider. Free items T&Cs can be found here

settings.question: I have an instalment plan but want to return part of my order?
settings.answer: We will refund you in full for the items that you have returned. This will be reflected on your monthly instalments plan and be deducted off your monthly payments, reducing the amount you pay each month.

settings.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
